sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const bookingOffers = [ { title: 'Weekend Escape', price: 'KSh 18,500', text: '2 nights in a deluxe room with breakfast and late checkout included.', }, { title: 'Business Comfort', price: 'KSh 22,000', text: 'Executive room stay with airport pickup, Wi-Fi, and meeting lounge access.', }, { title: 'Family Holiday', price: 'KSh 27,400', text: 'Family suite package with breakfast, dinner, and children activity access.', }, ]; const bookingPerks = [ 'Instant reservation support', 'Flexible room choices', 'Breakfast and dining options', 'Secure payment process', ]; const Bookings = () => { return (

Plan Your Stay

Book rooms, select your dates, and choose the package that fits your visit.

Make your reservation with a simple booking flow designed for holidays, business travel, family trips, and special occasions.

Reservation Details

Choose your stay preferences and continue to confirm your booking.

Continue To Booking

Why Book Here

Comfortable stays with flexible packages.

Select your room, guests, and stay style, then continue to secure payment and reservation confirmation.

{bookingPerks.map((perk) => ( {perk} ))}
{bookingOffers.map((offer) => (

Package Offer

{offer.title}

{offer.text}

{offer.price} Book Now
))}
); }; export default Bookings;
